summary: Document post-task engineering insight capture policy and answer recent Generator execution questions

success_criteria: Answer whether TASK-20260428-004 was implemented through Generator Claude CLI or directly by Analyst/Codex.
Record newly learned Generator wrapper insights in the appropriate harness memory mechanism.
Document or strengthen the policy for Analyst post-task insight capture so future sessions can discover it.
Do not expose secrets or environment values.

positive: Use existing logs/insights.jsonl and context/work-history policy if available.
Keep edits scoped to harness operating docs and logs.
negative: Do not modify product runtime code.
Do not run real Generator Claude CLI execution.

next_action: Create task branch and update insight capture documentation.
